title: bloome - Fragranced Wax Candles (Vanilla Surprise) 1 pc
description: Brand from Bloome. Vanilla Surprise Capturing the scents of nature. Long lasting fragrance. Enhance the atmoshere in any room of your home with the soothing. How to Use: Remove all packaging prior to use. Place on a flat, heat resistant surface away from walls and flammable materials. Light with a long taper or a match. Do not burn for more than 4 hours at any one time. Stop burning when 1cm of wax remains. If candle smokes, extinguish, allow to cool and trim wick to 5mm. Never allow candle to continue burning if the flame becomes enlarged. Extinguish the flame and allow to cool before handling or moving. Keep wax pool free from foreign objects such as matches. Please follow instructions carefully as product mosuse could result in personal injury or fire hazard. Pack Size - 1 pc
